title: SMSF contributions and rollovers
description: How to deal with contributions, deduction notices, rollovers and release authorities.
keywords: self-managed super fund contributions, self-managed super fund rollovers, SMSF contributions and rollovers

child_links.title: Accepting contributions
child_links.description: Understand the rules for what contributions you can accept as trustee of a self-managed super fund (SMSF).

child_links.title: Returning contributions
child_links.description: Restrictions on returning SMSF contributions and the limited circumstances when contributions can be returned.

child_links.title: Actioning personal contributions deduction notices
child_links.description: What trustees must do to respond to eligible members claiming personal super contributions tax deductions.

child_links.title: Rollovers for SMSFs
child_links.description: What trustees need to know about self-managed super fund (SMSF) rollovers and how to action them.

child_links.title: Responding to release authorities issued to SMSFs
child_links.description: What a release authority is and how your SMSF needs to respond.
